violations.text: Labels on packaged cookies were observed to be lacking complete information (Address of establishment). Per the PIC, address to be written as items labeled and new batches of labels. All items packaged and repackaged in the facility are to a label with all necessary information (common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address). New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The prep table in the kitchen area was observed to be placed in front of a wall with exposed wood wallboards. Per the PIC, appropriate surface materials are available on site to properly cover wood to provide appropriate surface characteristics for cleanability and indoor surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

At the time of inspection, a package of Rib Eye Beef was observed for sale in the reach in freezer. Upon questioning of the Owner, inspector was made aware that the beef is repackaged in an Reduced Oxygen Packaging on site. A FOOD ESTABLISHMENT that PACKAGES TIME/TEMPERATURE CONTROL FOR SAFETY FOOD using a REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGING method shall implement a HACCP PLAN. HACCP plan for Reduced Oxygen Packaged beef items is to be submitted to the RIDOH Center for Food Protection for review. HACCP Plan information supplied to PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

Pies packaged in the food establishment set for customer self selection in the retail space, are lacking proper labeling. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Pies to be kept at the register for customer request and handed to customers until proper labeling can be applied to packaging. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
